summary: Comprehensive testing of trade log enhancements completed successfully. All new staggered position features working: tranches, partial exits, position %, R risk/P&L calculations, watchlist integration, and status display. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI displaying all new features correctly.

integration_issues.issue: New trade with ticker 'TEST' may not appear immediately in table

passed_tests: Backend API: All 22 tests passed including new staggered position endpoints
Trade Log: New columns (Pos%, R Risk $, R P&L) displayed correctly
Trade Log: Staggered position display (remaining/total shares) working
Trade Log: Expandable tranche detail view with entries and exits
Trade Log: Add Entry, Partial Exit, Close All dialogs functional
Watchlist: Status column added and displaying trade status
Watchlist: Log Trade button working with pre-filled data
Integration: Watchlist to trade log integration working
Existing features: Dashboard, Position Sizer, Analytics, Settings accessible
